title: Mykonos
body_html:
Top Notes
Clementine, Wild Blackberry

Middle Notes
Cactus Flower, Camellia

Base Notes
Vanilla Orchid, Sheer Musk,


The Vibe:
Cool, breezy, and beautifully fresh. Mykonis is like stepping out of a warm shower into sunshine—crisp citrus, airy florals, and a whisper of soft musk. It’s clean without being plain, flirty without being loud. A true “fresh-outside” fragrance with an effortless glow.

When to Wear:
Perfect for everyday summer wear—think iced coffee mornings, casual brunches, and sunkissed afternoons. It’s your clean-girl scent with just the right touch of sexy.
